title: mobius-number: Complementary residue arithmetic — 0.1 + 0.2 = 0.3, exactly
description: A dual-strand number type that carries both IEEE 754 float64 (fast, lossy) and exact rational (Fraction) representations simultaneously. On collapse, the rational strand governs. Eliminates floating-point rounding errors that have existed since IEEE 754 was published in 1985.
notes: Part of the Möbius family — strand-native types that eliminate computational redundancy caused by representational imprecision.
